description: Powerful build system for the JVM.

tip: Signals the end of built-in options.

global_option.name: --configuration-cache-problems
tip: Configures how the configuration cache handles problems.

global_option.name: --console
tip: Specifies which type of console output to generate.

global_option.name: --console-unicode
tip: Specifies which character types are allowed in console output.

global_option.name: --continue
tip: Continues task execution after a task failure.

global_option.name: --daemon
tip: Uses the Gradle daemon to run the build.

global_option.name: --debug
tip: Sets log level to debug. Includes the normal stacktrace.

global_option.name: --develocity-plugin-version
tip: Version of the Develocity plugin to auto-apply.

global_option.name: --develocity-url
tip: Default URL of the Develocity server.

global_option.name: --dry-run
tip: Runs the build with all task actions disabled.

global_option.name: --exclude-task
tip: Specifies a task to exclude from execution.

global_option.name: --export-keys
tip: Exports the public keys used for dependency verification.

global_option.name: --foreground
tip: Starts the Gradle daemon in the foreground.

global_option.name: --full-stacktrace
tip: Prints the full stacktrace for all exceptions.

global_option.name: --gradle-user-home
tip: Specifies the Gradle user home directory.

global_option.name: --include-build
tip: Includes the specified build in the composite.

global_option.name: --info
tip: Sets the log level to info.

global_option.name: --max-workers
tip: Configures the maximum number of concurrent workers.

global_option.name: --no-configure-on-demand
tip: Disables the use of configuration on demand.

global_option.name: --no-continue
tip: Stops task execution after a task failure.

global_option.name: --no-daemon
tip: Runs the build without the Gradle daemon.

global_option.name: --no-scan
tip: Disables the creation of a Build Scan.

global_option.name: --offline
tip: Runs the build without accessing network resources.

global_option.name: --priority
tip: Specifies the scheduling priority for the Gradle daemon.

global_option.name: --project-dir
tip: Specifies the start directory for Gradle.

global_option.name: --project-prop
tip: Sets a project property for the build script.

global_option.name: --property-upgrade-report
tip: Runs the build with the experimental property upgrade report.

global_option.name: --refresh-keys
tip: Refreshes the public keys used for dependency verification.

global_option.name: --scan
tip: Generates a Build Scan (powered by Develocity).

global_option.name: --stacktrace
tip: Prints the stacktrace for all exceptions.

global_option.name: --status
tip: Shows the status of running and recently stopped Gradle daemons.

global_option.name: --stop
tip: Stops the Gradle daemon if it is running.

global_option.name: --task-graph
tip: Prints the task graph instead of executing tasks.

global_option.name: --update-locks
tip: Performs a partial update of the dependency lock.

global_option.name: --warn
tip: Sets the log level to warn.

global_option.name: --warning-mode
tip: Specifies which mode of warnings to generate.

global_option.name: --write-locks
tip: Persists dependency resolution for locked configurations.

global_option.name: --write-verification-metadata
tip: Generates checksums for dependencies used in the project.
